other_observers: None on 2/18. Jocelyn Brown from Houston, TX on 2/20.; Found by Rich Miller on 2/2/2007. Re-found on 2/15 by Rich Miller. Seen on 2/16 by Bill Maynard, Mark Peterson, and Brad Steger. Seen on 2/17 by John Drummond. Seen earlier in the day on 2/18 by Kara Lewantowicz and George Armbrust. Seen later in the
description: A large sparrow with golden yellow crown patch. Grayer overall than the nearby White-crowned Sparrows. See photos.Behaviors: The bird was hanging around the bushes and rocks with White-crowned Sparrow.Call: none heardPlumage: juvenile
